text:
No results were returned for that search. Given the automated checkers already confirmed the paper was not found in any academic database, and the ArXiv ID 2404.02285 points to a completely different paper ("LP++: A Surprisingly Strong Linear Probe for Few-Shot CLIP"), and my web search returned no results for the exact title, this reference is fabricated.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The exact title "Biotalk: Enzyme function prediction with natural language supervision" was not found in any academic database (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, DBLP, arXiv) nor via web search. The cited arXiv ID 2404.02285 points to an entirely unrelated paper about few-shot CLIP, confirming the reference is fabricated.
LINK: NONE
